fda_center: ORA - Division of Pharmaceutical Quality Operations I
purpose: 503B outsourcing-facility letter with a numbered Adulterated Drug Products / insanitary-conditions section (fda_insanitary_condition rows, including ISO 5 microbial recovery); exercises observation_subject (EM system) vs record_review_subject (211.192 microbial-recovery investigation) with the microbial-recovery observation/record-review forbidden swap, procedure_scope (aseptic + cleaning/disinfection validation), a corrective-action critique tied to the 211.192 violation, and a stated FEI (contrast with the no-FEI fixture 001).
